name: @sittir/validator
description: Canonical validation facade for sittir grammar packages

scripts.//build: TEMPORARY: --noCheck bypasses TS6307 cross-package source imports (validator imports codegen via ../../codegen/src/* paths that drag in transitive files not listed in validator's tsconfig). Validator's CLI normally runs via tsx, so dist is consumed only by codegen/cli.ts and tools/profile. Proper fix: replace source-path imports with @sittir/codegen package exports. See memory: project-wrap-emitter-children-typing-followup (same temporary-bypass family).
